key_risks: No IAM roles or policies defined
recommended_actions: Add iam.tf with roles and least-privilege policies

reliability.rationale: VPC has no subnets; deployment will fail

operational_excellence.rationale: CI present; plan only, no apply
key_risks: Terraform plan only; no apply workflow
recommended_actions: Add apply workflow with manual approval for prod

missing_components.reason: No aws_subnet resources; deployment will fail
No iam.tf or IAM resources; security blocker

production_baseline.not_ready_reason: NOT_READY because: (1) VPC has no subnet configuration — deployment will fail without subnets. (2) No IAM roles or policies defined — security blocker; least privilege cannot be assessed.

findings.title: VPC has no subnet configuration
findings.summary: VPC exists but no subnets; deployment will fail.
findings.evidence: No aws_subnet resources found; VPC exists but deployment will fail without subnets
findings.impact: Deployment will fail; workloads cannot be placed; no network isolation.

steps: Add aws_subnet resource blocks for public subnets (one per AZ)
Add aws_subnet resource blocks for private subnets (one per AZ)
Update terraform/vpc.tf and run terraform plan

findings.title: No IAM roles or policies defined
findings.summary: No IAM roles or policies; least privilege cannot be assessed.
findings.evidence: No iam.tf or IAM resources found; least privilege cannot be assessed
findings.impact: Workloads may run with overly broad credentials; blast radius of compromise is high; least privilege cannot be enforced.
findings.recommendation: Add iam.tf with roles and least-privilege policies

steps: Create iam.tf with aws_iam_role for CI, developer, and application
Add aws_iam_role_policy with least-privilege actions (no wildcards)

findings.title: No cost allocation tags
findings.summary: VPC has minimal tags; no cost allocation.
findings.evidence: VPC has minimal tags; no Environment, Project, or CostCenter tags observed
findings.impact: Cost allocation and chargeback cannot be performed; resource ownership unclear.

steps: Add tags block to aws_vpc and all subnet resources
Include Environment, Project, CostCenter per infrastructure-governance-questionnaire
Apply tags to existing resources via terraform apply
validation_steps: Tags visible in AWS Cost Explorer
Cost allocation report shows tagged resources

remediation_summary.ordering_reasoning: I1 (deployment_blocker) first — VPC has no subnets; deployment will fail without subnet configuration. I2 (security_blocker) second — no IAM roles or policies; blocks production readiness. I3 (improvement, cost_optimization) third — cost allocation tags; non-blocking optimization.
